description_long: This kiosk is a tall, rectangular structure with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a combination of wood-textured and dark-colored panels. The front face displays the word 'RECICLADO' in large, vertical white letters, suggesting its function as a recycling station or collection point. The upper section includes a prominent, striped cylindrical element, possibly a decorative or functional chute, positioned above a series of horizontal slats or slots. The sides are plain with a light wood finish, while the rear is mostly solid with a few horizontal black slots near the top. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a utilitarian aesthetic suitable for urban environments. The kiosk lacks visible windows or doors, emphasizing its role as a receptacle rather than an enclosed booth.
description: A tall, rectangular recycling kiosk with wood-textured sides, dark front panel, and a striped cylindrical feature on top. The front displays 'RECICLADO' and multiple horizontal slots, giving it a modern, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'RECICLADO' signage, horizontal slots, and the striped cylindrical element on top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain wood-textured panel and the depth of the kiosk.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly solid surface and a few horizontal black slots near the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood-textured panel and the kiosk's profile.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign, vertical, on front left panel, text: 'RECICLADO'
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with a prominent striped cylindrical element on top, no overhangs or awnings
